prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-payments/plan.md. All phases are complete. The implementation produced these uncommitted changed files: src/payments/processor.ts, src/payments/validator.ts, src/payments/types.ts, tests/payments/processor.test.ts. No deleted files, no .gitignore changes. Produce the full Code Review Findings section, showing exactly which subagents you would launch and how you partition the work.

assertions.text: Explicitly launches or describes launching code-simplifier subagent(s) for the changed files
Launches 3 code-reviewer subagents with distinct review lenses (simplicity/DRY, bugs/correctness, conventions/abstractions)
Uses a single materialized review_scope_files list shared across all subagents
Shows a Review Scope Coverage block with file counts and Completion Gate
